name: Coca-Cola Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown 3 lb beef in oil for ten minutes on each side; remove to crockpot and drain fat.
2. Break up tomatoes in their juice and add remaining ingredients, stirring until spaghetti sauce mix is dissolved.
3. Pour over meat; cover and simmer until meat is tender.
4. Thicken gravy; serve over sliced meat.
